query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `taskComments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `commentId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `taskId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `authorUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `taskComments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `taskComments_commentId_unique` UNIQUE(`commentId`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kNF22PapS9mysw.root --database WZQk4bD8DnsRHwYBkmh7FN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `taskComments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `commentId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `taskId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `authorUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `taskComments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `taskComments_commentId_unique` UNIQUE(`commentId`)
);
